---
title: 'causalml library exploration'
author: Iyar Lin
date: '2020-04-20'
slug: causalml_exploration
categories:
  - R
tags: [R, python, causal-inference]
comments: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = T, warning = F, message = F, cache = F)
set.seed(1)
options(scipen = 999)

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(char = c(
  "tidyverse", # best thing that ever happend to me
  "reticulate", # r interface to python
  "pander", # pretty table rendering
  "dagitty", # dags
  "ggdag" # pretty dag plotting
))
```

![](/post/dowhy_exploration_files/reticulated_python.png){width=600px height=300px}

```{r, results = "hide", eval = F}
# create a new environment
use_virtualenv("r-reticulate")

# install python packages into virtualenv
virtualenv_install("r-reticulate", "causalml")
```

```{r}
set.seed(1) # vary seed, n and effect_size below to get a sense of the model performance sensetivity
effect_size <- 0.25
p_x <- function(Tr, X1, X2, X3){
  lp <- 2*X1 + 0.2*X2 + as.numeric(X3)/6
  effect_size + (effect_size/0.125)*Tr*X1^3 + 
    (1 - 2*effect_size)*exp(lp)/(1+exp(lp))
}

n <- 10000
Tr <- rbinom(n, 1, 0.3)
X1 <- runif(n, -0.5, 0.5)
X2 <- rnorm(n)
X3 <- factor(sample(LETTERS[1:3], size = n, replace = T))
features <- data.frame(X1, X2, X3)
features_mat <- model.matrix(~ ., data= features)[,-1]
features_df <- as.data.frame(features_mat)
p <- p_x(Tr, X1, X2, X3)
Tr <- np_array(c("control", "treatment")[Tr + 1])
y <- np_array(sapply(p, function(x) rbinom(1, 1, x)))
```


```{r}
UpliftTreeClassifier <- import("causalml.inference.tree")$UpliftTreeClassifier

uplift_tree_string <- import("causalml.inference.tree")$uplift_tree_string


uplift_model <- UpliftTreeClassifier(
  max_depth=5, min_samples_leaf=200, 
  min_samples_treatment=50, 
  n_reg=100, evaluationFunction='KL', 
  control_name='control'
  )

uplift_model$fit(features_mat,
                treatment=Tr,
                y=y)

uplift_model = uplift_model$prune(features_mat,
                treatment=Tr,
                y=y, minGain = 0.01)

yay = uplift_model$predict(features_mat, full_output = T)
```

```{python}
from causalml.inference.tree import UpliftTreeClassifier
from causalml.inference.tree import uplift_tree_string, uplift_tree_plot

result = uplift_tree_string(r.uplift_model, ['X1', 'X2', 'X3B', 'X3C'])

```

```{r}
tau <- unlist(yay[[4]][[2]]) - unlist(yay[[4]][[1]])
p_treat <- p_x(rep(1, n), X1, X2, X3)
p_cont <- p_x(rep(0, n), X1, X2, X3)
cate <- p_treat - p_cont

y_lim <- c(min(tau, cate), max(tau, cate))
plot(c(min(X1), max(X1)), y_lim, type = "n", 
     main = "segmenTree",
     xlab = "X1", ylab = "true (red) vs predicted (black) lift")
points(X1, cate, col = "red")
points(X1, tau)
```
